en.welcome:
Welcome to Inter Ethiopia Solutions Agent Registration Bot

Please choose your application type below.
en.support:
For support, contact Inter Ethiopia Solutions
Email: agentapply@interethiopia.com
Phone: 0911238865 or 0911238865
WhatsApp: 0911238865 or 0911238865
en.choose_language: Please choose your language / ቋንቋ ይምረጡ
en.submitted: Your application has been submitted successfully.
en.timeline: Our team will respond within 3-5 business days.
en.status_not_found: No application found yet. Use /register to submit your application.
en.status_found:
Your application status: {status}
Our team will contact you soon.
en.terms_required: Please type I Agree to continue or Cancel to stop.
en.file_required: Please upload a file or image.
en.file_too_large: File too large. Max size is {size}MB.
en.file_unsupported: Unsupported file format. Please upload JPG, PNG, or PDF.
en.territory_unavailable: Sorry, this area is already reserved. Please select another nearby area.
en.register_choose_type: Choose your application type: Sales Agent / Installer Agent / Sales + Installer Agent
en.admin_menu_text:
Admin management menu:
- View Recent Applications
- Filter Applications
- Update Application Status
- Add Admin User
- Admin Dashboard Link
en.admin_only_management: Only bot admins can access admin management.
en.prompt_phone: Please enter your mobile number (Ethiopian format, e.g. +2519XXXXXXXX or 09XXXXXXXX).
en.prompt_experience_years: If yes, how many years? If no, type 0.
en.prompt_work_type: What type of work do you do?
en.prompt_has_shop: Do you have a shop or business? (Yes/No)
en.prompt_id_front: Please upload your National ID front image/document.
en.prompt_id_back: Please upload your National ID back image/document.
en.prompt_profile_photo: Please upload profile photo (optional). Type skip to continue.
en.prompt_preferred_territory: Select or type your preferred territory (same town/village or nearby area).
en.prompt_terms_reply: Reply with: I Agree or Cancel
en.admin_text_input_required: Please provide text input for the admin action.
en.admin_filter_format: Use format: region|applicant_type|status, or type Cancel.
en.top_matches_found: Top matches: {count} (showing up to 5 with media previews).
en.enter_numeric_telegram_id: Please enter a numeric telegram user id, or Cancel.
en.user_now_admin: User {user_id} is now a bot admin.
en.user_already_admin: User {user_id} is already a bot admin.
en.application_id_not_found: Application ID not found. Try again or type Cancel.
en.reply_status_update_format:
Reply using:
<Status>|<Territory Village or blank>|<Admin note>|<Agent Tag>|<Performance Potential>|<Internal Remarks>
Example: Approved|Bole 05|Verified docs|Hybrid|High|Fast learner
en.status_update_format_hint: Use format: <Status>|<Territory>|<Admin Note>|<Agent Tag>|<Performance Potential>|<Internal Remarks> or Cancel.
en.first_admin_assigned: You are now the first bot admin.
en.admin_command_active:
Admin command is active. To assign another admin, use:
/addadmin <telegram_user_id>
en.admin_only_assign_admins: Only bot admins can assign admins.
en.territory_help: Send /territory <TownOrVillage> to check if an area is reserved.
en.admin_only_features: Only bot admins can access admin features.
en.filter_instructions:
Send filters in format:
region|applicant_type|status
Use blanks to skip.
Example: Addis Ababa||Under Review
Type Cancel to stop.
en.send_application_id_to_update: Send the application ID you want to update, or type Cancel.
en.send_telegram_user_id_for_admin: Send the telegram user ID to grant admin access, or type Cancel.

am.welcome:
ወደ Inter Ethiopia Solutions የወኪል ምዝገባ ቦት በደህና መጡ

እባክዎን ከዚህ በታች የመተግበሪያዎን አይነት ይምረጡ።
am.support:
ለድጋፍ Inter Ethiopia Solutionsን ያግኙ
ኢሜል፡ agentapply@interethiopia.com
ስልክ፡ 0911238865 ወይም 0911238865
ዋትስአፕ፡ 0911238865 ወይም 0911238865
am.choose_language: እባክዎ ቋንቋዎን ይምረጡ / Please choose your language
am.timeline: ቡድናችን ከ3-5 የሥራ ቀናት ውስጥ ምላሽ ይሰጥዎታል።
am.status_not_found: እስካሁን ምንም ማመልከቻ አልተገኘም። ለማመልከት /register ይጠቀሙ።
am.yes_no_required: እባክዎ አዎ ወይም አይደለም ብለው ይመልሱ።
am.phone_invalid: የስልክ ቁጥሩ ትክክል አይደለም። እባክዎ +2519XXXXXXXX ወይም 09XXXXXXXX ይጠቀሙ።
am.file_too_large: ፋይሉ በጣም ትልቅ ነው። ከፍተኛው መጠን {size}MB ነው።
am.file_unsupported: የማይደገፍ የፋይል አይነት። እባክዎ JPG፣ PNG ወይም PDF ይጫኑ።
am.territory_unavailable: ይቅርታ፣ ይህ ቦታ አስቀድሞ ተይዟል። እባክዎ ሌላ በአቅራቢያ ያለ ቦታ ይምረጡ።
am.register_choose_type: የማመልከቻዎን አይነት ይምረጡ፡ የሽያጭ ወኪል / የቴክኒክ ሰራተኛ (Installer) / የሽያጭ እና ቴክኒክ ወኪል
am.admin_menu_text:
የአስተዳዳሪ ማውጫ፦
- የቅርብ ጊዜ ማመልከቻዎችን ተመልከት
- ማመልከቻዎችን አጣራ
- የማመልከቻ ሁኔታን አሻሽል
- አስተዳዳሪ ተጠቃሚ ጨምር
- የአስተዳዳሪ ዳሽቦርድ ሊንክ
am.admin_only_management: የአስተዳዳሪ ክፍሉን መጠቀም የሚችሉት የቦቱ አስተዳዳሪዎች ብቻ ናቸው።
am.prompt_experience_years: አዎ ከሆነ ስንት ዓመት? ከሌለዎት 0 ይተይቡ።
am.prompt_id_front: እባክዎ የብሔራዊ መታወቂያዎን የፊት ምስል ይጫኑ።
am.prompt_id_back: እባክዎ የብሔራዊ መታወቂያዎን የጀርባ ምስል ይጫኑ።
am.prompt_profile_photo: እባክዎ የመገለጫ ፎቶ ይጫኑ (አማራጭ)። ለመዝለል skip ብለው ይተይቡ።
am.prompt_preferred_territory: ተመራጭ ክልልዎን ይምረጡ ወይም ይተይቡ (ያሉበት ከተማ/መንደር ወይም በአቅራቢያ ያለ ቦታ)።
am.prompt_terms_reply: በዚህ መልኩ ይመልሱ፦ እስማማለሁ ወይም ሰርዝ
am.admin_text_input_required: እባክዎ ለአስተዳዳሪ ተግባሩ የጽሁፍ ግብዓት ያቅርቡ።
am.admin_filter_format: ይህን ፎርማት ይጠቀሙ፦ region|applicant_type|status ወይም 'ሰርዝ' ብለው ይተይቡ።
am.top_matches_found: የተገኙ ማመልከቻዎች፦ {count} (እስከ 5 የሚደርሱ በመልቲሚዲያ ቅድመ እይታ እየታዩ ነው)።
am.enter_numeric_telegram_id: እባክዎ የቴሌግራም ተጠቃሚ መለያ ቁጥር (ID) ያስገቡ፣ ወይም ሰርዝ ይበሉ።
am.application_id_not_found: የማመልከቻ መለያ ቁጥር (ID) አልተገኘም። እባክዎ እንደገና ይሞክሩ ወይም 'ሰርዝ' ይበሉ።
am.reply_status_update_format:
በዚህ መልኩ ይመልሱ፦
<ሁኔታ>|<ክልል/መንደር ወይም ባዶ>|<የአስተዳዳሪ ማስታወሻ>|<የወኪል መለያ>|<የአፈጻጸም አቅም>|<የውስጥ ማሳሰቢያ>
ምሳሌ: Approved|Bole 05|Verified docs|Hybrid|High|Fast learner
am.admin_only_send: /send መጠቀም የሚችሉት የቦቱ አስተዳዳሪዎች ብቻ ናቸው።
am.admin_command_active:
የአስተዳዳሪ ትዕዛዝ ንቁ ነው። ሌላ አስተዳዳሪ ለመመደብ ይህን ይጠቀሙ፦
/addadmin <telegram_user_id>
am.admin_only_assign_admins: አስተዳዳሪ መመደብ የሚችሉት የቦቱ አስተዳዳሪዎች ብቻ ናቸው።
am.territory_help: አንድ ቦታ መያዙን ለማረጋገጥ /territory <ከተማወይምመንደር> ብለው ይላኩ።
am.admin_only_features: የአስተዳዳሪ ተግባራትን ማግኘት የሚችሉት አስተዳዳሪዎች ብቻ ናቸው።
am.filter_instructions:
አጣሪዎችን በዚህ ፎርማት ይላኩ፦
region|applicant_type|status
ለመዝለል ባዶ ይተው።
ምሳሌ፦ Addis Ababa||Under Review
ለማቆም 'ሰርዝ' ብለው ይተይቡ።
am.send_application_id_to_update: ለማሻሻል የሚፈልጉትን የማመልከቻ መለያ ቁጥር (ID) ይላኩ፣ ወይም 'ሰርዝ' ይበሉ።
am.send_telegram_user_id_for_admin: የአስተዳዳሪነት ፈቃድ ለመስጠት የቴሌግራም ተጠቃሚ መለያ ቁጥር (ID) ይላኩ፣ ወይም 'ሰርዝ' ይበሉ።

om.welcome:
Baga nagaan gara Inter Ethiopia Solutions Agent Registration Bot dhuftan

Maaloo gosa iyyannaa keessanii armaan gadiitti filadhaa.
om.support:
Deeggarsaaf, Inter Ethiopia Solutions qunnamaa
Imeelii: agentapply@interethiopia.com
Bilbila: 0911238865 ykn 0911238865
WhatsApp: 0911238865 ykn 0911238865
om.choose_language: Maaloo afaan keessan filadhaa / Please choose your language
om.timeline: Garee keenya guyyoota hojii 3-5 gidduutti deebii isiniif kenna.
om.status_not_found: Hamma yoonaatti iyyannaan argame hin jiru. Iyyannaa keessan galchuuf /register fayyadamaa.
om.status_found:
Haala iyyannaa keessanii: {status}
Garee keenya dhiyootti isin qunnama.
om.registration_started: Baay'ee gaari! Galmee keessan haa jalqabnu.
om.yes_no_required: Maaloo Eeyyee ykn Lakki jettanii deebisaa.
om.phone_invalid: Akkaataan bilbilaa sirrii miti. +2519XXXXXXXX ykn 09XXXXXXXX fayyadamaa.
om.terms_required: Itti fufuuf 'Nan Walii Gala' ykn dhaabuuf 'Haquu' jedhaa barreessaa.
om.file_too_large: Faayiliin kun baay'ee guddaadha. Hammi guddaan {size}MB dha.
om.file_unsupported: Gosti faayilii kun hin deeggaramu. Maaloo JPG, PNG, ykn PDF fe'aa.
om.territory_unavailable: Dhiifama, naannoon kun duraan qabameera. Maaloo naannoo biraa dhiyoo jiru filadhaa.
om.register_choose_type: Gosa iyyannaa keessanii filadhaa: Agenta Gurgurtaa / Agenta Galchaa / Gurgurtaa + Galchaa
om.admin_menu_text:
Tarree bulchiinsa Admin:
- Iyyannoo Dhihoo Ilaali
- Iyyannoo Calali
- Haala Iyyannaa Haaromsi
- Fayyadamaa Admin Dabali
- Geessituu Admin Dashboard
om.admin_only_management: Admin-oota bot qofatu bulchiinsa admin seenuu danda'a.
om.prompt_phone: Maaloo lakkoofsa bilbila harkaa keessanii galchaa (Fakkeenya: +2519XXXXXXXX).
om.prompt_experience_years: Eeyyee yoo ta'e, waggaa meeqa? Yoo hin qabne 0 barreessaa.
om.prompt_id_front: Maaloo fakkii eenyummaa (ID) keessanii isa fuulduraa fe'aa.
om.prompt_id_back: Maaloo fakkii eenyummaa (ID) keessanii isa duubaa fe'aa.
om.prompt_profile_photo: Maaloo fakkii piroofaayilii fe'aa (filannoodha). Itti fufuuf 'skip' jedhaa barreessaa.
om.prompt_preferred_territory: Naannoo filattan filadhaa ykn barreessaa (magaalaa/ganda jirtan ykn naannoo dhiyoo).
om.prompt_terms_reply: Akkas jettanii deebisaa: 'Nan Walii Gala' ykn 'Haquu'
om.admin_filter_format: Akkaataa kanaan fayyadamaa: region|applicant_type|status, ykn 'Haquu' jedhaa.
om.no_applications_match_filter: Iyyannaan calallii keessan waliin deemu hin argamne.
om.top_matches_found: Iyyannoo argaman: {count} (hamma 5 miidiyaa waliin mul'achaa jiru).
om.enter_numeric_telegram_id: Maaloo lakkoofsa ID fayyadamaa telegram galchaa, ykn 'Haquu' jedhaa.
om.application_id_not_found: ID Iyyannaa hin argamne. Irra deebi'ii yaali ykn 'Haquu' jedhi.
om.reply_status_update_format:
Akkas jettanii deebisaa:
<Status>|<Territory Village or blank>|<Admin note>|<Agent Tag>|<Performance Potential>|<Internal Remarks>
Fakkeenya: Approved|Bole 05|Verified docs|Hybrid|High|Fast learner
om.status_update_format_hint: Akkaataa: <Status>|<Territory>|<Admin Note>|<Agent Tag>|<Performance Potential>|<Internal Remarks> ykn Haquu.
om.first_admin_assigned: Isin amma admin bot isa jalqabaati.
om.admin_command_active:
Tarkaanfiin admin hojii irra jira. Admin biraa ramaduuf:
/addadmin <telegram_user_id>
om.admin_only_assign_admins: Admin-oota bot qofatu admin ramaduu danda'a.
om.territory_help: Naannoon tokko qabamuu isaa mirkaneessuuf /territory <Magaalaa/Ganda> ergaa.
om.admin_only_features: Admin-oota bot qofatu tajaajila admin argachuu danda'a.
om.filter_instructions:
Akkaataa kanaan calallii ergaa:
region|applicant_type|status
Bakka duwwaa dhiisuun ni danda'ama.
Fakkeenya: Addis Ababa||Under Review
Dhaabuuf 'Haquu' jedhaa.
om.send_application_id_to_update: ID iyyannaa haaromsuu barbaaddanii ergaa, ykn 'Haquu' jedhaa.
om.send_telegram_user_id_for_admin: ID fayyadamaa telegram admin gochuu barbaaddanii ergaa, ykn 'Haquu' jedhaa.

ti.welcome:
እንቋዕ ናብ Inter Ethiopia Solutions ወኪል መመዝገቢ ቦት ብደሓን መጻእኩም

በጃኹም ካብዞም ዝስዕቡ ዓይነት መመልከቻኹም ይምረጡ።
ti.support:
ንሓገዝ Inter Ethiopia Solutions ኣዘራርቡ
ኢሜይል: agentapply@interethiopia.com
ቴሌፎን: 0911238865 ወይ 0911238865
ዋትስኣፕ: 0911238865 ወይ 0911238865
ti.choose_language: በጃኹም ቋንቋኹም ይምረጡ / Please choose your language
ti.timeline: ጋንታና ኣብ ውሽጢ 3-5 ናይ ስራሕ መዓልታት መልሲ ክህቡኹም እዮም።
ti.status_not_found: ክሳብ ሕጂ ዝተረኸበ መመልከቻ የለን። ንምምልካት /register ተጠቐሙ።
ti.status_found:
ኩነታት መመልከቻኹም: {status}
ጋንታና ድሕሪ ሓጺር ግዜ ከዘራርቡኹም እዮም።
ti.yes_no_required: በጃኹም እወ ወይ ኣይፋል ኢልኩም መልሱ።
ti.phone_invalid: ጌጋ ቁጽሪ ቴሌፎን። በጃኹም +2519XXXXXXXX ወይ 09XXXXXXXX ተጠቐሙ።
ti.file_too_large: ፋይል ኣዝዩ ዓቢ እዩ። ዝለዓለ ዓቐን {size}MB እዩ።
ti.file_unsupported: ዘይድገፍ ዓይነት ፋይል። በጃኹም JPG, PNG, ወይ PDF ጽዓኑ።
ti.territory_unavailable: ይቕሬታ፣ እዚ ቦታ ኣቐዲሙ ተታሒዙ እዩ። በጃኹም ካልእ ቀረባ ቦታ ይምረጡ።
ti.register_choose_type: ዓይነት መመልከቻኹም ይምረጡ: ወኪል መሸጣ / ወኪል ገጣሚ / ወኪል መሸጣን ገጣሚን
ti.admin_menu_text:
ዝርዝር ምሕደራ ኣድሚን:
- ናይ ቀረባ ግዜ መመልከቻታት ርአ
- መመልከቻታት ኣጻሪ
- ኩነታት መመልከቻ ኣሐድስ
- ኣድሚን ተጠቃሚ ወስኽ
- ሊንክ ዳሽቦርድ ኣድሚን
ti.admin_only_management: ኣድሚን ቦት ጥራይ እዮም ምሕደራ ኣድሚን ክጥቀሙ ዝኽእሉ።
ti.prompt_experience_years: እወ እንተኾይኑ ክንደይ ዓመት? እንተዘይብልኩም 0 ጽሓፉ።
ti.prompt_id_front: በጃኹም ናይ መለለዪ ወረቐትኩም (ID) ናይ ቅድሚት ስእሊ ጽዓኑ።
ti.prompt_id_back: በጃኹም ናይ መለለዪ ወረቐትኩም (ID) ናይ ድሕሪት ስእሊ ጽዓኑ።
ti.prompt_profile_photo: በጃኹም ናይ ፕሮፋይል ስእሊ ጽዓኑ (ኣማራጺ እዩ)። ንምሕላፍ 'skip' ኢልኩም ጸሓፉ።
ti.prompt_preferred_territory: ትመርጽዎ ዞባ ምረጹ ወይ ጸሓፉ (ዝነብሩሉ ከተማ/ዓዲ ወይ ቀረባ ቦታ)።
ti.prompt_terms_reply: በዚ መገዲ መልሱ: እሰማማዕ ወይ ሰርዝ
ti.admin_filter_format: ነዚ ፎርማት ተጠቐሙ: ክልል|ዓይነት_መመልካቲ|ኩነታት፣ ወይ ሰርዝ ኢልኩም ጸሓፉ።
ti.top_matches_found: ዝተረኸቡ መመልከቻታት: {count} (ክሳብ 5 ምስ ስእሊ ይርኣዩ ኣለዉ)።
ti.enter_numeric_telegram_id: በጃኹም ቁጽሪ ቴሌግራም መለለዪ (ID) የእትዉ፣ ወይ ሰርዝ ኢልኩም ጸሓፉ።
ti.user_now_admin: ተጠቃሚ {user_id} ሕጂ ኣድሚን ቦት ኮይኑ ኣሎ።
ti.application_id_not_found: መለለዪ መመልከቻ (Application ID) ኣይተረኸበን። እንደገና ፈትኑ ወይ ሰርዝ ኢልኩም ጸሓፉ።
ti.reply_status_update_format:
በዚ መገዲ መልሱ:
<ኩነታት>|<ዞባ/ዓዲ>|<ናይ ኣድሚን መዘከርታ>|<ታግ ወኪል>|<ዓቕሚ ስራሕ>|<ናይ ውሽጢ ርእይቶ>
ኣብነት: Approved|Bole 05|Verified docs|Hybrid|High|Fast learner
ti.first_admin_assigned: ሕጂ ንስኹም ቀዳማይ ኣድሚን እዚ ቦት ኮይንኩም ኣለኹም።
ti.admin_only_send: ኣድሚን ቦት ጥራይ እዮም /send ክጥቀሙ ዝኽእሉ።
ti.admin_command_active:
ትእዛዝ ኣድሚን ንጡፍ እዩ። ካልእ ኣድሚን ንምሻም:
/addadmin <telegram_user_id>
ti.admin_only_assign_admins: ኣድሚን ቦት ጥራይ እዮም ኣድሚን ክሰይሙ ዝኽእሉ።
ti.territory_help: ሓደ ቦታ ምትሓዙ ንምፍላጥ /territory <ከተማወይዓዲ> ኢልኩም ስደዱ።
ti.admin_only_features: ኣድሚን ቦት ጥራይ እዮም ንገሊኦም ስራሓት ኣድሚን ክጥቀሙ ዝኽእሉ።
ti.filter_instructions:
በዚ ፎርማት ኣጻርዩ:
ክልል|ዓይነት_መመልካቲ|ኩነታት
ንምሕላፍ ባዶ ግደፍዎ።
ኣብነት: Addis Ababa||Under Review
ንምቁራጽ ሰርዝ ኢልኩም ጸሓፉ።
ti.send_application_id_to_update: ከተሐድስዎ ትደልዩ መለለዪ መመልከቻ ስደዱ፣ ወይ ሰርዝ ኢልኩም ጸሓፉ።
ti.send_telegram_user_id_for_admin: ኣድሚን ክኸውን ንትደልዩሉ ተጠቃሚ ቴሌግራም መለለዪ ስደዱ፣ ወይ ሰርዝ ኢልኩም ጸሓፉ።
